subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou the Precursor of Mercy and the Dispenser of Bounty, the Pardoner of transgressions, forgive Thou the sinners and transform [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا سابق الرحمه و یا سابغ النعمه و غافر الحوبه تغفر للخطاه و تبدل
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
